name: ecommerce-fullstack-design
description: Full-stack eCommerce web application with React, Express, and MongoDB

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix netlify/functions
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run install:all && npm run check:netlify && npx netlify-cli deploy --dir=client/dist --functions=netlify/functions --prod
